# maximumNorm

**Instance Property**

A float value that, if set, causes the layer to renormalize the selected embedding vectors to have an Lp norm less than this value.

## Declaration

```swift
var maximumNorm: Float? { get }
```

## Discussion

Renormalization occurs in the forward pass only.

## Inspecting Embedding Descriptors

- **embeddingCount**: The size of the dictionary.
- **embeddingDimension**: The dimension of embedding vectors.
- **paddingIndex**: An unsigned integer value that, if set, causes the layer to initialize the embedding vector at that index to zero.
- **pNorm**: The p of the Lp norm.
- **scalesGradientByFrequency**: A Boolean that indicates whether the layer scales gradients by the inverse of the frequency of words in batch before the weight update.
